reading.title: Reading: My recent experiences
reading.passage: I have had so many great experiences this year. I have completed my first marathon, which was a real challenge. I have also had a new opportunity at work. It has been a memorable year.

questions.question: The writer has completed a marathon.
What new thing has the writer had at work?
questions.explanation: "I have also had a new opportunity at work."

reading.title: Reading: Have you ever...?
reading.passage: I have visited Da Lat twice. I have tried Vietnamese coffee many times. However, I have never met a famous person, and I have never travelled alone.

questions.question: The writer has met a famous person.
questions.explanation: "I have never met a famous person."

questions.question: How many times has the writer visited Da Lat?
